title: Marvell's 58% Drop Last Year Gives Investors a Magnificent Buying Opportunity
text: Once the economy rebounds, this company's business should take off like a rocket.

title: Marvell Technology: Fade The CFO Reshuffle
text: Marvell's CFO departs; as she will be replaced by an internal candidate, though, the outcome is likely status quo. The guidance range has also been narrowed, and with the bar already reset significantly lower, the setup into the upcoming earnings report is compelling.

title: AMD, Marvell Technology Name New CFOs
text: AMD, Marvell Technology Name New CFOs

title: AMD poaches Marvell's Jean Hu for CFO slot as Devinder Kumar retires
text: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. said late Wednesday that financial chief Devinder Kumar was retiring and that Marvell Technology Inc.'s Jean Hu would take his place.

title: Marvell Announces CFO Transition
text: Willem Meintjes Appointed Chief Financial Officer Reaffirms Midpoint of Fourth Quarter of Fiscal 2023 Revenue Outlook, Narrows Range to +/- 3% SANTA CLARA, Calif. , Jan. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today announced that Willem Meintjes, who has served as Marvell's Chief Accounting Officer and Treasurer since 2018, has been appointed Chief Financial Officer, effective January 20, 2023.

title: 7 Cheap Tech Stocks to Buy Before the Next Breakout
text: There are plenty of cheap tech stocks to buy since so many lost a lot of their value over the last year. The tech-heavy Nasdaq composite index has lost more than 33% of its value in 2022.

title: Semiconductors Winners And Losers At The Start Of 2023
text: The year 2022 was bad for semis even though business was mostly good, which provides an important clue as to how 2023 could play out. Fundamentals in the semiconductor industry deteriorated as 2022 went by, but stocks did the opposite by getting better heading into 2023.
